title: pedicularis refracta var. refracta
intro: Pedicularis refracta var. refracta, also known as Lophelia or Lousewort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. Traditionally, Pedicularis refracta var. refracta has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Pedicularis refracta var. refracta is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
